category_title: Students who exhibit frustration through crying and self-abusive behavior during long tasks
minimal_context: Shaun is sitting at his desk in the self-contained classroom while the staff member gives instructions for an academic task from a distance.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Shaun, I am going to stand over here, a few meters away, to give you the instructions for your academic task.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Whines and looks away from the task, demonstrating off-task behavior.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please look at the paper and tell me what the first question says.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Makes grunting noises and uninterpretable, garbled vocalizations.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best to answer the question.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Begins crying loudly, making more uninterpretable noise, and engages in self-abusive behavior.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Shaun, I am going to stand over here, a few meters away, to give you the instructions for your academic task.

STUDENT: (Whines and looks away from the task, demonstrating off-task behavior.)

TUTOR: Please look at the paper and tell me what the first question says.

STUDENT: (Makes grunting noises and uninterpretable, garbled vocalizations.)

TUTOR: Just try your best to answer the question.

STUDENT: (Begins crying loudly, making more uninterpretable noise, and engages in self-abusive behavior.)
